title: Alert Manager
ph_condition: entity_id or Jinja2 template (e.g. binary_sensor.door or {{ states('sensor.x') | float > 30 }})
ph_title_template: Jinja2 template. Variables: name, condition, entity_id, triggered_at
hint_repeat_zero: 0 = no repeat (send once). Any other value = repeat every N minutes.
hint_resolve_message: Leave empty for no resolve notification.
empty_no_alerts: No alerts configured. Click "{btn_new}" to create one.
err_load_failed: Failed to load alerts. Check the connection and try again.
err_condition_invalid: Condition does not evaluate to a valid boolean value.
err_category_required: Enter a name for the new category.
err_notif_data_json: Notification data is not valid JSON.
err_targets_required: At least one notification target is required when notifications are enabled.
err_notif_templates_invalid: One or more notification templates are invalid: {fields}.
preview_template_not_bool: Template result: {result} — not a valid boolean value
tooltip_condition_bool: Condition must evaluate to a boolean value
tooltip_fix_id: Fix the Entity ID issue first
ph_title_optional: Optional — leave blank to send no title
hint_title_blank: Leave blank to send no title.
hint_data_shared: Applied to both alert and resolve notifications.
hint_skip_first: When repeat is enabled, wait for the first interval before sending the first notification.
